3cf294dee31003e410576c7cc4802d845f6961a0.text: The number of equally likely pairs where both balls are the same color is 26.

6c132a64cd9766f100450856475cb475a70f3cad.text: The time complexity of binary search on a sorted array of \( n \) elements is \( O(\log n) \).
